description.en: A string specifying the UI mode to use for the sign-in flow. Possible values are:activeThe sign-in flow must be initiated via a user action such as clicking a button. Ifmodeis set toactive,providerscan only have a length of1, otherwise theget()promise will reject.passiveThe sign-in flow can be initiated without direct user interaction. This is the default value.SeeActive versus passive modefor more details of the difference between the two modes.
